description_long: This object represents an adult pedestrian with a stylized, angular form and simplified anatomical features. The figure appears to be in a dynamic walking pose, with one leg extended forward and the other trailing behind, suggesting movement. The body is composed of sharp, faceted surfaces, giving it a low-polygon, geometric appearance. The head is slightly forward, and the arms are positioned close to the sides, with minimal detail. The overall silhouette is elongated and abstract, lacking fine details such as facial features or fingers. The coloration is predominantly a muted pinkish tone, with some darker shading on the lower limbs and back.
description: A stylized, angular adult pedestrian in a walking pose, with faceted surfaces and minimal anatomical detail. The figure is elongated and abstract, primarily in muted pinkish tones.
description_view_0: Close-up of the upper body and head, showing smooth, faceted surfaces and a pinkish hue.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the extended leg and angular, geometric form of the lower body.
description_view_2: Rear three-quarter view emphasizing the sharp, polygonal shapes of the back and legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the trailing leg and the overall elongated, abstract silhouette.
attribute_clothing_type: simplified, form-fitting garment with no visible accessories or distinct features
